hypothesis: A valency-aware training objective that explicitly encodes aromatic-bond counting using the refined Narom/Vother valency framework will yield generative models whose outputs exhibit higher chemical validity (larger fraction of atoms with allowed valencies) and smaller GFN2-xTB relaxation and geometry deviations (bond lengths, angles, and torsions) compared with standard training, and this improvement will generalize from GEOM-Drugs to a broader organic molecule dataset.
